description: Repository-scan retrieval hints for the currently formalized plan_stability_and_stats_dependency subpatterns. Use this file to build a candidate set before applying the verdict-layer subpattern JSON files.

defaults.group_match_semantics: For grep_keywords_all_groups, every group should match at least one keyword before the candidate is treated as high-priority.
defaults.any_match_semantics: grep_keywords_any is only for weak recall; false positives are acceptable at this layer and should be filtered later by manual review plus the verdict-layer subpattern JSON.
defaults.exclude_semantics: grep_keywords_exclude are soft down-rank hints by default unless the caller explicitly chooses hard exclusions. Prefer recall over precision unless a known noise class causes sibling confusion or unreviewable candidate explosion.
defaults.rg_template_semantics: Treat broad_recall as the default first hop for coarse repository scanning. Use fallback_no_path only when broad_recall is empty, implausibly sparse, or likely to miss due to helper/layout drift. Use group_intersection only as an optional lightweight shrinker after recall; it must never be treated as an absence proof or hard gate.
defaults.path_globs_semantics: path_globs are soft search-priority hints, not hard absence proofs. Because some anchors may live in helper .go files or SQL/result assets, rerun fallback_no_path before concluding a subpattern is absent.

entries.subpattern_key: 统计信息真正 load / materialize / apply 之前不应断言依赖它的计划或统计输出
entries.pattern_file: 统计信息真正_load_materialize_apply_之前不应断言依赖它的计划或统计输出.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳优先抓 stats 真正 ready 之前就去断言的场景：显式 load/update、未初始化 histogram/bucket、以及仍未 loaded 的 patch 形态。不要把 analyze-input 漂移、cache 命中或 runtime-context cache reuse 混进这条。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳按 stats-ready/load/materialize anchor 粗召回。这里保留 `Buckets == 0` / `not loaded` 这一类 patch-backed widening，只服务 candidate retrieval。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 broad_recall 过 sparse 或 stats-ready 锚点落在 helper / non-test file 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底；仍然只保留 stats-ready anchor。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把 stats-ready anchor 与 stats/plan 断言锚点做文件级交集，帮助把一般 stats helper 改动和真正依赖 stats output 的测试收束开；它只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。

entries.subpattern_key: histogram / selectivity / correlation / async-load item count 这类统计派生数值不应做 exact constant assertion
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳先看 stats-derived numeric output 与 numeric-normalization/stable-property 断言锚点，不要把 stats-ready 或 analyze-input 漂移混进这条。这里关心的是 exact constant 被降级成 delta/range/lower-bound。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳抓 bucket/selectivity/correlation/async-load item count 以及 `Equal -> InDelta/range/lower-bound` 这类 patch-backed normalization 锚点。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 broad_recall 过 sparse 或 numeric normalization 落在 helper / non-test file 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底；仍然只保留 stats-derived numeric anchor。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳做 stats-derived numeric anchor 与 stable-property assertion anchor 的文件级交集，帮助把一般 histogram helper 改动和真正的 numeric exactness case 区分开；它只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。

entries.subpattern_key: analyze inputs / sampling / version / predicate-column scope 必须先钉死
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳抓 analyze-input 漂移：samplerate、analyze version、all-columns scope、predicate-column collection，以及 threshold-side 数据规模控制。不要把 stats-ready 或 cache-side case 混进这条。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳按 analyze inputs / scope / version / threshold-side 数据规模的 patch-backed broad anchor 粗召回；这里允许 false positive，因为目标是先把 sibling 真实形态看见。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 broad_recall 过 sparse 或 analyze-input 锚点落在 helper / non-test file 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底；仍然只保留 analyze-input anchor。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把 analyze-input anchor 与依赖 stats 输出/plan 的断言锚点做文件级交集，帮助把一般 analyze 语义改动与真正的 test-stability case 收束开；它只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。

entries.subpattern_key: cache-hit / read-from-cache 不应写成逐次硬断言；必须先等 cache ready，再断稳定性质
entries.pattern_file: cache_hit_read_from_cache_不应写成逐次硬断言_必须先等_cache_ready.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳先抓 cache hit/read-from-cache 与 cache ready/warmup 观测，不要把 execution-time context cache reuse 或 stats/analyze case 混进这条。这里关心的是“每轮都必须 hit cache”这种硬约束太脆。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳按 cache hit/read-from-cache/warmup anchor 粗召回。这里故意允许 false positive，因为目标是先把 cache-ready/readiness 相关 sibling 找出来。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 broad_recall 过 sparse 或 cache-ready 锚点落在 helper / non-test file 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底；仍然只保留 cache-ready anchor。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把 cache hit/readiness anchor 与 runtime observation/warmup anchor 做文件级交集，帮助把一般 cache table 改动与真正的 per-run cache-hit hard-assertion case 区分开；它只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。

entries.subpattern_key: cache reuse 不应遮蔽 execution-time context
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳先抓 execution-time context 会被 cache/fold 藏掉的场景：stale read、prepared/non-prepared cache、binding、extension function、privilege 或 constant fold。不要把 cache-ready/read-from-cache 观测混进这条。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳按 execution-time context + cache reuse / fold anchor 粗召回。它只服务 candidate retrieval，不把 verdict 提前下放到检索层。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 broad_recall 过 sparse 或 execution-time-context 锚点落在 helper / non-test file 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底；仍然只保留 execution-time-context anchor。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把 runtime-context anchor 与 cache-disable / fold-disable / prepared-exec anchor 做文件级交集，帮助把一般 stale-read/binding 功能改动和真正的 execution-time-context cache sibling 区分开；它只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。
